title: Lead Quality Development (SDET) Engineer-Gen AI
company_focus:
Cellular IoT connectivity platform for enterprise IoT
devices
description:
About Aeris Communications Inc.

For more than three decades, Aeris has been a trusted
cellular IoT leader enabling the biggest IoT programs and
opportunities across Automotive, Utilities and Energy, Fleet
Management and Logistics, Medical Devices, and
Manufacturing. Our IoT technology expertise serves a global
ecosystem of 7,000 enterprise customers and 30 mobile
network operator partners, and 90 million IoT devices across
the world. Aeris powers today’s connected smart world with
innovative technologies and borderless connectivity that
simplify management, enhance security, optimize performance,
and drive growth.

AI‑Assisted Quality Engineering (SDET)

Experience: 4–8 years

Employment Type: Full‑time

Location: Noida Sector 62 (Work from Office – 5 days a week)

Role Summary

We are seeking a Lead QualDev Engineer to drive AI‑assisted
Quality Engineering initiatives across functional and
automation testing, CI/CD, and defect prevention. This role
emphasizes technical ownership, AI‑driven automation, and
self‑healing test frameworks, enabling faster, more reliable
software delivery in a product‑based engineering
environment.

Key Responsibilities

- Own the design, evolution, and maintenance of scalable test
  automation frameworks across UI, API, and integration
  layers
- Leverage AI‑assisted tools (GitHub Copilot, VS Code Copilot)
  to accelerate test development, refactoring, and debugging
- Drive functional, regression, and integration testing
  strategies with a strong automation‑first mindset
- Lead API automation initiatives and backend/data validation
  efforts
- Integrate automated test suites into CI/CD pipelines
  (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI)
- Lead analysis of test failures, logs, and production
  defects, performing in‑depth root cause analysis (RCA)
- Apply AI‑based log analysis and failure pattern detection to
  identify systemic quality issues
- Design and implement AI‑driven self‑healing automation
  capabilities, including intelligent locator recovery and
  adaptive stabilization
- Drive preventive quality improvements by reducing flaky
  tests, recurring defects, and test maintenance overhead
- Define best practices, standards, and governance for
  AI‑enabled Quality Engineering
- Mentor junior engineers and promote quality ownership across
  cross‑functional teams
- Collaborate closely with Engineering, DevOps, and Product
  teams to embed quality throughout the SDLC

Core Skills & Experience

- 4–8 years of hands‑on experience in Quality Engineering /
  SDET roles
- Strong experience in test automation design and framework
  ownership
- Expert‑level knowledge of UI and API automation frameworks
- Experience with BDD frameworks (e.g. Cucumber)
- Solid experience with API testing and backend/data
  validation
- Hands‑on experience integrating automated tests into CI/CD
  pipelines
- Strong understanding of STLC, SDLC, and Agile methodologies
- Proven ability to lead defect analysis and preventive
  quality initiatives
- Proficiency with Git and modern version‑control practices

AI & GenAI Skills

- Hands‑on experience using AI‑assisted development and
  testing tools (GitHub Copilot, VS Code Copilot)
- Ability to write effective prompts for AI‑assisted test and
  code generation
- Strong capability to review, validate, and secure
  AI‑generated outputs
- Understanding of AI agent concepts, including prompt‑driven
  execution, tool orchestration, and feedback loops
- Experience implementing or contributing to AI‑driven
  self‑healing automation
- Commitment to responsible and governed AI usage in the SDLC

Nice‑to‑Have / Preferred Skills

- Programming experience in Python, Java, JavaScript, or
  TypeScript
- Experience with Selenium WebDriver and Playwright
- Knowledge of SQL and database testing
- Exposure to Docker, containerized test execution, and
  Linux/Unix environments
- Experience with cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure)
- Knowledge of performance testing tools (JMeter, Gatling)
- Exposure to Kafka, Elasticsearch, Redis
- Product‑based company background
- Prior experience in IoT, Telecom, or large‑scale distributed
  systems
- Knowledge of secure coding practices, especially for
  AI‑generated code
responsibilities: Design, evolve, and maintain scalable test automation frameworks across UI, API, and integration layers
Leverage AI-assisted tools like GitHub Copilot to accelerate test development, refactoring, and debugging
Drive functional, regression, and integration testing strategies with an automation-first mindset
Integrate automated test suites into CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI
Design and implement AI-driven self-healing automation capabilities including intelligent locator recovery
Lead analysis of test failures, logs, and production defects with root cause analysis
Apply AI-based log analysis and failure pattern detection to identify systemic quality issues
Mentor junior engineers and define best practices for AI-enabled Quality Engineering
use_cases: AI-assisted test automation and self-healing test frameworks for IoT platform quality
AI-driven log analysis and failure pattern detection for defect prevention
Prompt-driven AI agent concepts for test and code generation
Automated quality engineering for IoT connectivity and telecom systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Quality Engineering/SDET role that uses AI tools
(GitHub Copilot, AI-driven self-healing test frameworks) to
assist in testing workflows, but does not build, train,
fine-tune, or deploy AI/ML models. The AI usage is辅助 —
leveraging AI to accelerate test development, log analysis,
and self-healing automation rather than developing the
underlying AI systems themselves.
